Use the action menu (three vertical dots: Use the action menu (three vertical dots) next to each document to review, reprocess, or delete it.
Use the action menu (three vertical dots) next to each investment to view details, edit, or delete the investment. You can also initiate new transactions directly from this menu.

We recommend completing the following st: We recommend completing the following steps to have a great experience with YAFFA.
Web scraping is a technique to extract d: Web scraping is a technique to extract data from websites. It is a common method to get data from websites that do not provide APIs.
When disabled, no new documents will be: When disabled, no new documents will be created or processed by AI.
When enabled, YAFFA automatically merges: When enabled, YAFFA automatically merges transaction items that share the same category and tags (or no tags) and have no comment into a single item, summing their amounts.
When enabled, each AI step uses prior pr: When enabled, each AI step uses prior prompt/response pairs from this document as conversation context. This can improve accuracy for complex documents but increases processing time and token usage.
YAFFA can create some accounts, currenci: YAFFA can create some accounts, currencies and categories for a convenient start. You can customize these anytime.
YAFFA is an easy to use personal finance: YAFFA is an easy to use personal finance tracker.

account.requirement.accountGroup: Before creating an account, please add at least one account group. E.g. cash, bank accounts, savings, etc. Account groups help to organize your accounts.
account.requirement.currency: Before creating an account, please add at least one currency. Accounts must have a currency assigned.
e.g., This receipt is in French. The acc: e.g., This receipt is in French. The account name cannot be extracted, please use Bank account of John.
investment.requirement.currency: Before creating an investment, please add at least one currency. Investments must have a currency assigned.
investment.requirement.investmentGroup: Before creating an investment, please add at least one investment group. E.g. stocks, bonds, etc. Investment groups help to organize your investments.
sandbox.login.info: You can create a new account for testing by registering. Feel free to use a disposable email address or fake credential. You can also explore existing demo data using the credentials below.
sandbox.reset.info: Until that, feel free to look around and make any changes.
sandbox.reset.timer: The data in this sandbox environment is regularly cleared. Time until next reset: :days :daysLabel and :hours :hoursLabel
transaction.requirement.account: Before creating a transaction, please add at least one account. This can be a bank account, a wallet, etc.
transaction.requirement.investment: Before creating an investment transaction, please add at least one investment. This can be a stock, a bond, etc.
widget.accountBalance.loadErrorPrefix: There was an error while getting account data:
widget.categoryWaterfall.noData: There is no data to show on this chart.
widget.payeeCategoryRecommendation.accep: Accept recommendation and set it as default category for payee
widget.payeeCategoryRecommendation.dismi: Don't show category recommendations for this payee any more
widget.payeeCategoryRecommendation.maybe: Hide this recommendation, but it might be displayed later
widget.payeeCategoryRecommendation.parag: Your payee :payeeLink used category :categoryText :maxCount times out of :totalCount transactions. It might be a good idea to set it as default category.
